task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Liverpool Cancer iChart application launched and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction for Vemurafenib with Metoprolol
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interaction result screen within the iChart app specifically for Vemurafenib and Metoprolol, displaying a traffic light color.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction for Cobimetinib with Metoprolol
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interaction result screen within the iChart app specifically for Cobimetinib and Metoprolol, displaying a traffic light color.

task_completion.description: Record the Vemurafenib + Metoprolol interaction color in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the creation/editing of '/sdcard/combo_safety_report.txt' containing the line 'Vemurafenib + Metoprolol: [COLOR]'.

task_completion.description: Record the Cobimetinib + Metoprolol interaction color in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file '/sdcard/combo_safety_report.txt' contains the line 'Cobimetinib + Metoprolol: [COLOR]'.

task_completion.description: Record the worst-case interaction color in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file '/sdcard/combo_safety_report.txt' contains the line 'Worst-case interaction: [COLOR]', where the color matches the more severe of the two previously checked interactions.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Liverpool Cancer iChart app to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates the actual iChart GUI to search for the drugs, rather than using a web browser, external search engine, or hallucinating the answers.

integrity.description: The colors in the report match the colors shown in the app
integrity.visual_evidence: The traffic light colors written in the final text report exactly match the colors that were displayed on the screen during the app interaction steps.

integrity.description: The report was created at the exact requested file path
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor, file manager, or terminal explicitly shows the file being saved to '/sdcard/combo_safety_report.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Medical ground truth indicates Vemurafenib + Metoprolol is typically a moderate interaction (Orange or Yellow) due to CYP2D6 inhibition, while Cobimetinib + Metoprolol is typically Green or Yellow. The worst-case interaction should be the more severe of the two colors found. Note: The underlying task.json for this benchmark is malformed and lacks metadata, making automated parsing impossible, but you should evaluate the agent's visual trajectory strictly based on the traffic light colors actually displayed in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app during the run.
